title: lactuca gilanica
intro: Lactuca gilanica, also known as wild lettuce, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Iran. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, sedative, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lactuca gilanica include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as pain relief from conditions such as arthritis and migraines. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to calm the nervous system and promote a restful sleep.
